title: Astondoa 40 — “Fufi”
subtitle: Spanish-built 12.5 m motor yacht — at home in Puerto Banús, anchored off the Golden Mile for a long lunch.
author: BoatHire24 Fleet Desk × Boat Rental In Marbella

sections.heading: Overview
sections.html:
Astondoa 40 — known to her crew as “Fufi” — is the Spanish equivalent of the classic Mediterranean motor yacht. Built in Cádiz by Astondoa, fitted out in teak and cream leather, she is never more at home than anchoring off the Golden Mile for a long lunch while La Concha rises behind the bay.

At 12.5 metres she carries up to nine guests with a licensed skipper at the helm and fuel in the tanks — both included in every charter. With a shaded flybridge above and two private cabins below, she is equally suited to a two-hour swim stop or a full day along the Marbella coast.
sections.image_caption: Guests relaxing on the bow of the Astondoa 40 at Puerto Banús marina.

sections.heading: On-board highlights
sections.html:
Fufi’s layout splits the day neatly between sun and shade: the flybridge for the cruise out, the saloon’s table-for-six when lunch arrives, and the bathing platform for everything in between.

  • Flybridge with shaded bimini and second helm
  • Cream-leather saloon with table-for-six and air conditioning
  • Two private cabins for overnight charter
  • Spanish-built (Astondoa, Cádiz) — local provenance
  • Toys on board: snorkel gear, inflatable donut & paddleboard
sections.image_caption: The saloon — cream leather, teak finish and a table that seats six out of the sun.

sections.heading: Pricing & inclusions
sections.html:
Rates below are all-in for the boat, not per person — minimum charter 2 hours. Every booking includes the items listed under the table; there are no fuel surcharges and VAT is already inside the price.

DurationRate (all-in)

4 hours€1,299

6 hours€1,799
7 hours€2,099
8 hours€2,299

Included in every charter:

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Drinks (water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava)
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance
  • Safety equipment
  • VAT (21%)

sections.heading: Departure information
sections.html:
Fufi departs from Puerto Banús, Marbella’s flagship marina — the exact berth is confirmed with your booking. Classic routes run east along the Golden Mile toward Marbella’s old town, or simply drop anchor off the beach clubs for swimming, paddleboarding and lunch on board.

Half-day charters typically leave mid-morning or mid-afternoon; for sunset cruising, ask for the last slot of the day. Availability and instant booking at boatrentalinmarbella.com/boats/astondoa-40.
sections.image_caption: Arriving back into Puerto Banús at sunset — the last charter slot of the day.

callout.heading: Nine guests, one skipper, the Golden Mile off the bow.
